untranslatable_reason: Signal requires continuous monitoring of market microstructure (bid-ask spread, order book depth, volatility regime changes) with dynamic thresholds. These require real-time market data feeds and regime detection logic not available in the provided indicator list. Specific parameters needed: spread threshold, volatility threshold, liquidity depth threshold, and revaluation frequency—all marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original signal.
translation_notes: HARRIS_DRY_18_0 describes a dynamic order execution strategy that adapts to regime shifts rather than a static entry/exit rule. The signal emphasizes adaptive monitoring and reassessment rather than fixed conditions. ADX_14 used as proxy for trend/regime strength detection, but the core requirement for spread/depth/volatility micro-data monitoring cannot be expressed with available indicators. A full implementation would require custom market microstructure indicators and real-time regime classification module.
